description: Source-release input manifest. It is intentionally source-only and excludes runtime samples, VM state, generated build output, archives, reports, signing material, and local secrets.

releaseContract.runtimePayloadSource: not applicable; source package is source-only
releaseContract.operatorDiagnostics: install/run expose read-only Hyper-V prerequisite, VM profile, guest payload, VT key, runtime-root, and RuntimePublishRoot guidance; package-portable.ps1 writes generated metadata including reviewerChecklist and sourceRuntimeSafetyMetadata, and prints stage/archive/safety diagnostics without VM, driver signing, GUI signing fallback, or CSignTool side effects. Machine-readable installModeContract documents existing environment, checkpoint/snapshot restore boundaries, fresh/create local setup, first-computer prerequisites, compatibility boundaries, and explicit package/readiness non-mutation with Chinese gap next actions.
releaseContract.machineReadableGapAudit: package-manifest.generated.json:gapAudit and release-readiness.json:gapAudit use ksword.release.gap-audit.v28 and cover no fresh live evidence, RuntimePublishRoot completeness, self-noise guard readiness, no VM mutation/no signing guardrails, and component progress
releaseContract.runtimeCompletenessDiagnostics: source package metadata still records RuntimePublishRoot as not applicable while release-readiness.json:gapAudit.runtimePublishRootCompleteness explains that runtime handoff must be verified separately with an external RuntimePublishRoot
releaseContract.noFreshLiveGuardrail: package/readiness do not generate fresh live evidence; release notes must say 本候选未刷新 fresh live evidence unless a lab job id is recorded
releaseContract.machineReadableExecutionBoundaries: package-manifest.generated.json:executionBoundaries and release-readiness.json:executionBoundaries explicitly list no smoke, no Hyper-V live, no signing, no CSignTool, no push/publish
releaseContract.machineReadableRequiredEvidenceFields: package-manifest.generated.json:requiredEvidenceFields and release-readiness.json:requiredEvidenceFields list branch, commit, dirty status, runtime handoff fields, and fresh-live claim fields
releaseContract.gitProvenanceFields: package-manifest.generated.json:gitMetadata and release-readiness.json:gitMetadata include branch, full commit, short commit, dirtyStatus, statusCount, and statusPreview

modes.packageReadinessMutation: forbidden; restore/refresh is explicit lab/live only

modes.titleZh: 首次/新机器本机配置流程
modes.packageReadinessMutation: none; package/readiness do not create VM/checkpoint/payload
none; package/readiness do not probe or mutate live host prerequisites

boundaries: source/package/readiness are low-side-effect and do not require live Hyper-V
Hyper-V live requires Windows_NT, Hyper-V features/module, hardware virtualization, existing VM, and clean checkpoint
Runtime payloads must come from an external RuntimePublishRoot
VirusTotal is optional hash-only enrichment and is unrelated to Intel VT-x/AMD-V

modes.packageReadinessMutation: no installer modes, no CheckEnvironment execution, no VM start/restore/stop, no signing, no push/publish, no fresh live evidence

nextActionsZhWhenMissing: 下一步：补齐 releaseContract.installModeContract.modeIds 中缺失的安装模式。
下一步：重新生成 package-manifest.generated.json/release-readiness.json，确认 installContractGaps 为空。
下一步：不要通过 readiness/package 运行 install、Hyper-V live、VM mutation、签名或 push/publish。

readinessPackageNonMutation.chinese: 中文：readiness/package 只生成 metadata/staging，不运行安装模式、不启动/还原/停止 VM、不签名、不 push/publish。

releaseContract.machineReadableInstallModeContract: package-manifest.generated.json:installModeContract and release-readiness.json:installModeContract cover existing-environment, restore-checkpoint-snapshot, fresh-create-flow, first-computer-prerequisites, compatibility-boundaries, and readiness-package-non-mutation.
releaseContract.installContractGapMetadata: installContractGapDetected, installContractGaps, and installContractGapNextActionsZh provide Chinese next actions when manifest/package/readiness install contract gaps are detected.
releaseContract.readinessPackageNonMutationExplicit: package/readiness execute no installer modes, no CheckEnvironment, no VM start/restore/stop, no driver signing, no CSignTool, no git push, and no network publish.

contains: package kind, version, source revision, branch, dirty-state preview
staged file inventory with sizeBytes and sha256 for payload files
generated reviewerChecklist for source/runtime handoff, release-note fields, and hard reject conditions
sourceRuntimeSafetyMetadata declaring source-only/source exclusions, external RuntimePublishRoot-only runtime payloads, and non-mutating safety state
safety contract for secrets, VM state, runtime evidence, signing, GUI signing fallback, push/publish, and CSignTool
manifest required checks and optional packaging diagnostics
machine-readable componentProgress snapshot for deployment/productization review
machine-readable gapAudit v28 snapshot for no fresh live evidence, RuntimePublishRoot completeness, no VM mutation/no signing guardrails, self-noise guard readiness, and component progress
operatorDiagnostics.runtimePublishRootDiagnostics and runtimeCompletenessDiagnostics showing source package runtime handoff is not verified here
executionBoundaries declaring smoke/live/signing/CSignTool/push were not executed
gitMetadata with branch, full commit, short commit, dirty status, status count, and preview
requiredEvidenceFields for source handoff, runtime handoff, and fresh live claims
runtimeHandoffMissingNextActionsZh with Chinese next actions when complete RuntimePublishRoot handoff is missing
reviewerChecklist JSON and no-fresh-live guardrail fields
installModeContract for existing environment, restore checkpoint/snapshot boundary, fresh/create flow, first-computer prerequisites, compatibility boundaries, and readiness/package non-mutation
installContractGapDetected, installContractGaps, and installContractGapNextActionsZh with Chinese next actions when install contract metadata is incomplete
stagedMetadata.selfHashNote: The generated manifest lists itself in files but omits a recursive self-hash from fileInventory.

requiredChecks: Run scripts/Test-RepositoryPolicy.ps1 before cutting a source package.
Cut source packages from a clean git worktree unless AllowDirtySource is explicitly documented.
Do not include runtime-root folders, submitted samples, VM disks/checkpoints, local state/secrets, build intermediates, signed driver binaries, or private signing material.
package-manifest.generated.json and release-readiness.json must expose executionBoundaries: no smoke, no Hyper-V live, no signing, no CSignTool, no push/publish.
Machine-readable handoff evidence must include branch, commit, dirty status, requiredEvidenceFields, and Chinese next actions when complete RuntimePublishRoot handoff is missing.

Generated package/readiness metadata must include installModeContract, installContractGaps, and installContractGapNextActionsZh covering existing environment, restore checkpoint/snapshot, fresh/create flow, first-computer prerequisites, compatibility boundaries, and package/readiness non-mutation.

componentProgressTemplate.purpose: Machine-readable deployment/productization progress for release reviewers; not fresh live evidence.

components.handoffGate: external RuntimePublishRoot; host-web, guest-tools, tools/job-tool, tools/postprocess; no repository bin/obj/x64 fallback
source handoff does not verify runtime payloads; rerun release readiness/package with external RuntimePublishRoot and complete-runtime switches
exclude samples, reports, VM state, generated artifacts, secrets, signing material, CSignTool
PowerShell parse, repository policy, source StageOnly dry-run; no Hyper-V/live/heavy E2E
fresh live claims require explicit lab job id, commit, runtime root, timestamp, and report paths
static rules/docs audit confirms self-noise, collection-health, VT quiet state, and behaviorCounted=false boundaries without smoke/live
Chinese next-step remediation is present in readiness/package/install/run output
installModeContract mode ids present; installContractGaps empty; Chinese installContractGapNextActionsZh present when gaps are detected; package/readiness non-mutation explicit
